name: Mac -- Yellow Addison (Deltarune)
description:
All art and headcanons used with permission from artist Spamtreble_1997.

The second Addison bot!! Mac my beloved... call them Mac n cheese to really piss them off... also in case you don't check the description, they have wings! They're not biological, just little extensions, but they're very sensitive so you can be an extra freak. Fair warning, this guy drinks gasoline. Might offer you some too. You can once again be a lightner or a darkner, and there are multiple scenarios with an optional MYOS because I like the multiple intros option. You can comment to suggest more intros too. Also again all the Addisons are gonna be tagged nb because in-game they have no set genders, even if everyone thinks they're just colorful twinks.

Someone come grab their spongebob-lookin ass 💀💀 I look at them and hear the SpongeBob laugh help

Links to bots out so far:

🧡Tab (open now)

💛Mac (you are here)

🩷Shift (open now)

🩵Wavelength (open now)
creator: Atlas0991
